description: Monster sound assignments â€” maps monster sound IDs to specific sound entries in Sounds.txt for attack, hit, death, and ambient events. Referenced by MonSound/UMonSound columns in MonStats.txt.

Id.description: Monster sound set identifier, referenced by MonStats.txt MonSound/UMonSound columns. Not read by 1.13c engine

Attack1.description: Primary attack sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

Weapon1.description: Primary weapon impact sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

Att1Del.description: Attack 1 sound delay in frames. Not read by 1.13c engine

Wea1Del.description: Weapon 1 sound delay in frames. Not read by 1.13c engine

Att1Prb.description: Attack 1 sound probability (0-100). Not read by 1.13c engine

Wea1Vol.description: Weapon 1 sound volume (0-255). Not read by 1.13c engine

Attack2.description: Secondary attack sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

Weapon2.description: Secondary weapon impact sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

Att2Del.description: Attack 2 sound delay in frames. Not read by 1.13c engine

Wea2Del.description: Weapon 2 sound delay in frames. Not read by 1.13c engine

Att2Prb.description: Attack 2 sound probability (0-100). Not read by 1.13c engine

Wea2Vol.description: Weapon 2 sound volume (0-255). Not read by 1.13c engine

HitSound.description: Sound effect when monster is hit. Not read by 1.13c engine

Skill1.description: Skill 1 sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

Skill2.description: Skill 2 sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

Skill3.description: Skill 3 sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

Skill4.description: Skill 4 sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

Footstep.description: Footstep sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

FootstepLayer.description: Footstep layered/secondary sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

FsCnt.description: Footstep frame count per step cycle. Not read by 1.13c engine

FsOff.description: Footstep frame offset within walk animation. Not read by 1.13c engine

FsPrb.description: Footstep sound probability (0-100). Not read by 1.13c engine

Neutral.description: Ambient/neutral idle sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

NeuTime.description: Neutral sound repeat interval in frames. Not read by 1.13c engine

Init.description: Initialization/spawn sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

Taunt.description: Taunt/aggro sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

Flee.description: Flee/retreat sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

CvtMo1.description: Conversion mode 1 animation token. Not read by 1.13c engine

CvtSk1.description: Conversion skill 1 sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

CvtTgt1.description: Conversion target type 1. Not read by 1.13c engine

CvtMo2.description: Conversion mode 2 animation token. Not read by 1.13c engine

CvtSk2.description: Conversion skill 2 sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

CvtTgt2.description: Conversion target type 2. Not read by 1.13c engine

CvtMo3.description: Conversion mode 3 animation token. Not read by 1.13c engine

CvtSk3.description: Conversion skill 3 sound effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

CvtTgt3.description: Conversion target type 3. Not read by 1.13c engine

EOL.description: End of line marker (not loaded by game). Not read by 1.13c engine
